docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED DEC-27-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DAVID
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,500.00 FILED BY HAWTHORNE, TRACEE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAWTHORNE, TRACEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DAVID $2,281.19 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,281.19, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $700.00 SEC. DEPOSIT + $870.00 LOST WAGES + $111.19 PGE + $600.00 FOR 1 MONTH RENT DIFFRENCE TOTALING $2281.19. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-02-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-02-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF TRACEE HAWTHORNE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAVID JOHNSON IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2022 - JUDGMENT.
